global.description: The ad features a prominent logo and clear call-to-action with engaging text.
global.main_message: Encouraging new players to join and earn rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: IronQuest logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'IronQuest' in bold, prominent font.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large, eye-catching headline that reads 'Win epic rewards' in a bold font.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Text below the headline that states 'Free rewards for new players' in a smaller, clear font.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A geometric shape or design element positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A small icon representing gameplay, possibly a game controller or similar.

elements.label: Right decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element or icon located on the right side of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button labeled 'Shop now' in a bold, contrasting color to encourage user interaction.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small, possibly circular decorative element located near the top.

elements.label: Small text element
elements.description: A small text element positioned centrally, possibly decorative or supplementary.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: Another small decorative element located at the top, possibly circular.

elements.label: Small text element
elements.description: A small text element positioned centrally, possibly decorative or supplementary.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A prominent headline that reads 'IronQuest' in a bold, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Text that communicates the main offer, stating 'Win epic rewards Free rewards for new players' in a clear font.
elements.text_content: Win epic rewards Free rewards for new players

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button at the bottom of the ad labeled 'Shop now' in a bold, contrasting color.
